arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen and Bayern Munich monitoring 1.FC Köln goalkeeper Jonas Urbig
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Bayer Leverkusen are monitoring the situation alongside Bayern Munich surrounding 1.FC Köln goalkeeper Jonas Urbig. It has previously been reported that Urbig is not interested in renewing…

arts.ttl: Who is Slavko Vincic, the referee for Barcelona vs Bayern in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: Slavko Vincic is set to take charge of today’s heavyweight Champions League tie between Barcelona and Bayern Munich (3pm ET). The experienced referee oversaw last season’s Champions League final when he took charge of Real Madrid’s 2-0 win over Borussia Dortmund at Wembley .

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona vs Bayern Munich – Combined XI
arts.sum: Barcelona meet Bayern Munich in the Champions League this evening, as two star-studded squads collide in continental competition. Ahead of the clash in Catalonia, we’ve picked our Combined XI from the two teams. Barcelona vs Bayern Munich – Combined XI Goalkeeper: Manuel Neuer – Bayern Munich Manuel Neuer starts in goal with the German great […] The post FC Barcelona vs Bayern Munich – Combined XI first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Barcelona free agent target wants a €15m signing bonus
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies has informed any and all clubs interested in his services that they will need to pay up, to lure him away from Bavaria next summer.…

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal & Barcelona join race for Jhon Duran as Aston Villa set asking price
arts.sum: Aston Villa's in-form striker Jhon Duran has reportedly attracted interest from Arsenal and Barcelona after a prolific start to the season, although any club would have to match an eye-watering price tag. Predictably, Duran scored Villa's winning goal against West Ham in the opening game of the season.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany names Barcelona youngster as 'future leader of world football'
arts.sum: Cubarsi was not the only player singled out for praise from Kompany, who also took the time to express his excitement towards Lamine Yamal's potential. Widely recognised as one of the finest centre-backs of his generation, Kompany admitted he expects Cubarsi to receive similar praise down the line once his career reaches the next level.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern and Leverkusen battle for highly-rated goalkeeper
arts.sum: According to Sport Bild, FC Köln's Jonas Urbig has attracted the interest of both Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Director pickpocketed in Barcelona ahead of clash with Hansi Flick’s side
arts.sum: Anyone visiting Barcelona is advised to be aware of their belongings while out in public, whether they be a tourist or a director at a major football club. Reports in Catalunya say that a member of the Bayern Munich expedition to Barcelona was robbed on Tuesday evening. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star names Barcelona pair as his ‘idols’ ahead of UCL clash
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has revealed that he considers a pair of Barcelona legends as his footballing ‘idols’, ahead of the upcoming meeting between the clubs. Barca and Bayern…

arts.ttl: Sane ‘SURPRISE’: Bayern Munich star’s reaction to Newcastle links
arts.sum: Leroy Sane has reacted to transfer rumours linking him with a January move to Newcastle United, though the reaction of the Bayern Munich winger will not be one to please the Toon Army. Sane ‘SURPRISE’: Bayern Munich star’s reaction to Newcastle rumours
